pages.text: $(o)"You can copy a circle's pattern. You can bottle a circle's spirit. Only the true scholar knows which is which."$()$(br2)$(l)Inscription Quill$() compresses circle knowledge into scrolls.

pages.title: Two Scrolls
pages.text: $(l)Structure Blueprint Scroll$(): preserves the full block layout of a tier — for fast rebuilds.$(br2)$(l)Function Imprint Scroll$(): preserves the active function of a circle — for one-shot remote triggers.$(br2)Both require a $(l)valid Circle Core$() as source.

pages.title: Operation
pages.text: $(l)Right-click valid core$() → imprint current tier $(l)structure$() onto parchment$(br2)$(l)Shift + Right-click core (with sigil)$() → imprint current $(l)function$()$(br2)Cost per scroll: $(l)1 parchment + several mana crystals$(), and 1 quill durability.

pages.title: Using Structure Scroll
pages.text: $(l)Right-click air$() → ghost preview, missing blocks shown in blue$(br2)$(l)Shift + Right-click ground$() → consume inventory and $(l)build the entire circle$() (incl. core) at once$(br2)Best for replicating identical layouts across multiple bases.

pages.title: Using Function Scroll
pages.text: $(l)Right-click$() → trigger the function once at your position (activate + one tick + deactivate, all in one).$(br2)Cost: ~ $(l)2x$() the function's base upkeep mana, in crystals.$(br2)Useful when you need a circle's effect away from your circle — but it's one-shot, not persistent.
